evals.prompt: Add an UpdateRoute command to the Routes feature.
evals.expected_output: Creates src/HikingLog.Application/Routes/Commands/UpdateRoute.cs containing the UpdateRoute record, an UpdateRouteValidator (internal sealed), and an UpdateRouteHandler with OneOf<UpdateRouteResult, ValidationFailed, NotFound>. Does not touch queries, controller, or DI beyond noting the register-di handoff.
assertions: Creates a single file UpdateRoute.cs under Routes/Commands/
File contains the record, validator, and handler together
Handler return type is OneOf<UpdateRouteResult, ValidationFailed, NotFound>
Validator is internal sealed class deriving AbstractValidator<UpdateRoute>
Handler returns NotFound when the entity is missing
XML doc <summary> present on all types and members
Does NOT create a query, controller, or entity

evals.expected_output: Creates DeleteHikeLog.cs with a DeleteHikeLog record and DeleteHikeLogHandler returning OneOf<Success, NotFound>. No validator is created (Delete has nothing to validate).
assertions: Handler return type is OneOf<Success, NotFound>
No validator class is created for the delete command
Handler returns NotFound when the entity does not exist and Success after removal

evals.prompt: Add an AddStage command. A Stage belongs to a Route.
evals.expected_output: Creates AddStage.cs with the AddStage record (including RouteId), AddStageValidator, and AddStageHandler returning OneOf<AddStageResult, ValidationFailed, NotFound> because the parent Route must exist. Handler checks the Route exists before adding.
assertions: Handler return type includes NotFound because Stage is a child of Route
Handler checks the parent Route exists before persisting
AddStage record includes the RouteId foreign key
Validator and handler are in one file under Stages/Commands/
